final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a product launch campaign centered on 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact presentation cover aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a dominant hero background image with title and subtitle overlaid in a brand-aligned layout
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a translucent, immersive, visually striking atmosphere — exact environmental treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with automotive brand prestige — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of depth and translucency in the background — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title), "9月上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve brand-aligned hierarchy: hero background → primary title → subtitle
Avoid:
